name: Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai
region_intro: Mountain bike trails around Guernica y Luno traverse a diverse landscape within Spain's Basque Country, notably the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. This UNESCO-designated area features dynamic marsh systems, vineyards, and riverbanks. The region also includes the Oiz mountain, offering varied elevations, and the unique Oma Forest with its painted trees. The terrain provides a mix of long climbs, panoramic viewpoints, and descents suitable for mountain biking. Best mountain bike trails around Guernica Y Luno The most popular mountain bike trail is Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai, a 29.1 miles (46.8 km) trail that takes 4 hours 32 minutes to complete. This difficult route features significant elevation gain within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Sollube Summit – Summit of Sollube loop from Gernika, a moderate 22.7 miles (36.5 km) path. This route ascends to the Sollube Summit, offering panoramic views of the surrounding area. Local mountain bikers also love the Artzubi Bridge – Ajangiz Village and Church loop from Gernika, a 18.5 miles (29.7 km) trail leading through rural villages and past historical sites, often completed in about 2 hours 42 minutes. Mountain biking around Guernica Y Luno is defined by the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve's marsh systems, extensive vineyards, and forested river valleys. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to various skill levels. The routes in Guernica Y Luno are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 20 reviews. More than 300 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Guernica Y Luno's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available in Guernica y Luno?
A: There are over 40 mountain bike trails around Guernica y Luno, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels. These routes traverse the diverse landscapes of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Guernica y Luno?
A: Yes, Guernica y Luno offers a few easier mountain bike routes. While many trails are moderate to difficult, there are at least 2 routes classified as easy, providing a good starting point for less experienced riders.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Guernica y Luno?
A: The terrain around Guernica y Luno is varied, ranging from long tracks climbing through vineyards to paths offering panoramic views and descents along riverbanks. You'll encounter the dynamic marsh systems of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve and forested areas, including the unique Oma Forest.

Q: Are there any challenging mountain bike routes for advanced riders?
A: Absolutely. For experienced riders seeking a challenge, there are 15 difficult routes available. One such route is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1058337773/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-8-reserva-de-la-biosfera-de-urdaibai" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai&lt;/a&gt;, a 46.8 km trail with significant elevation gain (1,590m) within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve.

Q: What are some scenic viewpoints or natural attractions accessible by mountain bike?
A: Many trails offer stunning views, particularly within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. You can find wonderful views from spots like the hermitage of San Cristóbal. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5269209" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Views over the Urdaibai marsh&lt;/a&gt; are also a highlight. Additionally, the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6628930" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Oma Forest&lt;/a&gt;, with its painted trees, offers a culturally rich experience amidst nature.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in the area?
A: Yes, many of the mountain bike routes around Guernica y Luno are designed as loops. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20506912" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sollube Summit – Summit of Sollube loop from Gernika&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 36.5 km path that takes you to the Sollube Summit and back, offering panoramic views.

Q: What historical or cultural landmarks can I see while mountain biking?
A: You can encounter several historical and cultural sites. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10513326" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Artzubi Bridge – Ajangiz Village and Church loop from Gernika&lt;/a&gt; takes you through rural villages and past historical sites. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1923359" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guernica Mural in Gernika&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1050528" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Old Tree of Gernika (Gernikako Arbola)&lt;/a&gt; are also notable landmarks in the town itself.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Guernica y Luno?
A: The mountain bike routes in Guernica y Luno are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 20 reviews. Many riders praise the diverse terrain, from the marsh systems to the vineyards and forested river valleys, and the variety of options for all skill levels.

Q: Are there any moderate mountain bike trails that offer a good balance of challenge and scenery?
A: Certainly. A popular moderate option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15001962" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Arrola Oppidum loop from Institutoa&lt;/a&gt;, which spans 26.1 km with 700m of elevation gain. This route provides a good workout while allowing you to enjoy the regional landscapes.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Guernica y Luno?
A: The diverse landscapes of Guernica y Luno, particularly within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, are enjoyable throughout much of the year. Spring and autumn generally offer pleasant temperatures and vibrant scenery, making them ideal for mountain biking. Summer can also be good, especially in the mornings or late afternoons to avoid the midday heat.

Q: Is there parking available at the trailheads?
A: While specific parking details vary by trailhead, Guernica y Luno, as a town, generally offers parking options. Many routes start from or pass through accessible areas, and you can often find parking in or near the town center or at designated points closer to the trail entrances.

Q: Can I reach the mountain bike trails using public transport?
A: Guernica y Luno is well-connected by public transport within the Basque Country, including train and bus services. This makes it feasible to reach the town and access many of the surrounding trails without a car, though specific trailhead access might require a short ride or walk from public transport stops.
tips: This is a lovely trail that can be a bit difficult when wet but otherwise easy to follow.
The top itself has a tower, continue a little further and there is the lookout booth in the photo
Bermeo is a beautiful seaside town and worth a visit, but if you can't go, the view from the trail is pretty good too.
